pin: # ZF G8P75HZ TCM 49-pin internal connector pin map.
# electrical_type follows the KiCad pin-type convention:
#   power_in   = 12 V supply / GND from harness
#   input      = digital or analog input to the TCM
#   output     = digital or analog output from the TCM
#   no_connect = pin physically present but unassigned in source PDF
# electrical sense of the signal at this pin
name: used by tests to flag
NC1
notes: unassigned in source PDF — likely sensor return or 5V

name: LIN_PUMP
notes: LIN bus to aux 12 V oil pump (HZ hybrid only)

name: PARK_SENSE_GND
notes: Common ground for the park-position switches

name: SPEED_SENSE_5V
notes: +5 V excitation to shaft speed sensors (red wire — annotation in source PDF marked '?')

name: EXT13_T30A
notes: Routes to ext pin 13; paralleled with pin 23 for +12 V T30 supply current capacity

name: EXT13_T30
notes: OEM T30 +12 V battery (paralleled with pin 22)

name: EXT14_T31
notes: OEM T31 chassis ground (paralleled with pin 25)

name: EXT14_T31B
notes: Routes to ext pin 14; paralleled with pin 24 for return current capacity

name: VBAT_SOL_A
notes: +12 V supply to solenoid bank (paralleled with 38/39/40 for current capacity)
